workspaceGuard.selectGigDesc: Please select a specific Gig from the dropdown menu above to load your Leads, verify call eligibility, slots, and training progress.
workspaceGuard.trainingRequiredDesc: You must complete 100% of your training modules (including the call script) for this Gig before placing calls.
workspaceGuard.sessionRequiredDesc: You must have a scheduled active slot reserved to start placing calls.
workspaceGuard.connectionErrorDesc: Unable to validate call conditions. Please check your network or refresh the page to try again.
workspaceGuard.modalSubtitle: Please fulfill all required eligibility conditions to start placing calls.
workspaceGuard.checkGigDesc: Be officially enrolled and assigned to the selected gig.
workspaceGuard.checkTrainingDesc: Complete all required training sessions, including the call script study (100%).
workspaceGuard.checkSessionDesc: Plan and reserve a time slot for the gig in the schedule.

trainingAllGigsGuard.modalSubtitle: To access the COCKPIT, you must select a specific gig from the dropdown on the Training page instead of "All enrolled gigs".
